title: The Retrieval Evaluation Process
description: A flowchart depicting the cyclical process of evaluating an Information Retrieval (IR) system using a test collection, including the creation of a gold standard and the calculation of performance metrics.
relationships: The process starts with a Test Collection which is input into the IR System. The system's Retrieved Results are compared against the Test Collection's gold standard Relevance Judgments to calculate Evaluation Metrics. The results are then analyzed to interpret the system's performance, potentially leading to refinements and a new evaluation cycle.
